packageRules.description: Batch GitHub Action digest/version bumps into one PR.

customManagers.description: Surface actionlint release bumps for the pinned binary in lint.yml. Renovate bumps ACTIONLINT_VERSION; refresh ACTIONLINT_SHA256 from the release checksums (the lint sha256 check fails closed until you do).
Surface ruff release bumps for the pinned binary in lint.yml. Renovate bumps RUFF_VERSION; refresh RUFF_SHA256 from the release checksums (the lint sha256 check fails closed until you do).

Surface OpenSSF Scorecard release bumps for the pinned binary in scorecard.yml. Renovate bumps SCORECARD_VERSION; refresh SCORECARD_SHA256 from the new release (the sha256 check fails closed until you do).
